channel.title: GS MENA Conflict News Monitor
channel.description: Consolidated RSS feed for monitoring ongoing Middle East conflict.

item.title: Al-Monitor | France's Macron urges Iran to cease regional attacks, restore Hormuz navigation
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 23:36 UTC ————————————————

March 15 (Reuters) - French President Emmanuel Macron said on Sunday he had asked Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian to put an immediate end to attacks against countries in the Middle East whether directly or through proxies, including in Lebanon and Iraq.

"I reminded him that France is acting within a strictly defensive framework aimed at… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/frances-macron-urges-iran-cease-regional-attacks-restore-hormuz-navigation

item.description: Al Jazeera • Mar 15, 2026 23:34 UTC ———————————————— Pressure grows on the US president's administration as war costs spiral and the mission's endgame remains unclear. ———————————————— Read more: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/3/15/top-trump-advisor-says-iran-war-price-tag-at-approximately-12bn-so-far?traffic_source=rss

item.title: Al-Monitor | EU to discuss bolstering Mideast naval mission amid Iran war turmoil
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 23:01 UTC ————————————————

By Andrew Gray and Lili Bayer

BRUSSELS, March 15 (Reuters) - European Union foreign ministers will discuss on Monday bolstering a small naval mission in the Middle East but are not expected to decide on extending its role to the choked-off Strait of Hormuz, diplomats and officials say.

The EU’s Aspides mission was established in 2024 to… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/eu-discuss-bolstering-mideast-naval-mission-amid-iran-war-turmoil

item.description: Al Bawaba • Mar 15, 2026 20:59 UTC ———————————————— ALBAWABA - Veteran journalist Jamal Rayyan dies, leaving lasting legacy in Arab media.Al Jazeera Media Network mourns the passing of its esteemed colleague and journalist, Jamal Rayyan, who died today, Sunday, at the age of 73, after a media career spanning more than five decades, during which he became a prominent figure in news and political programming... ———————————————— Read more: https://www.albawaba.com/entertainment/al-jazeera-journalist-jamal-rayyan-dies-1623834

item.title: Al-Monitor | Israel and Lebanon expected to hold talks soon, Israeli officials say
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 20:01 UTC ————————————————

JERUSALEM, March 15 (Reuters) - Israel and Lebanon are expected to hold talks in the coming days aimed at securing a durable ceasefire that would see Hezbollah disarmed, two Israeli officials said on Sunday, though the timing and terms have yet to be agreed.

Beirut is forming a delegation for talks but no date has been set. Lebanon needed clarity… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/israel-and-lebanon-expected-hold-talks-soon-israeli-officials-say

item.title: Al-Monitor | Afghan asylum-seeker dies in ICE custody, US advocacy group says
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 19:01 UTC ————————————————

By Joey Roulette

March 15 (Reuters) - An Afghan immigrant who previously worked with the U.S. military in Afghanistan and later sought asylum in the United States died this weekend in Immigration and Customs Enforcement custody less than 24 hours after being detained in Texas, a U.S. veteran-led advocacy group said on Sunday.

———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/afghan-asylum-seeker-dies-ice-custody-us-advocacy-group-says

item.title: Al-Monitor | Germany sceptical about expanding EUOperation Aspides in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 18:01 UTC ————————————————

FRANKFURT, March 15 (Reuters) - German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul said on Sunday that he was sceptical about a potential widening of the European Union's Aspides naval mission to the Strait of Hormuz.

Wadephul said that the mission to help commercial shipments pass through the Red Sea was "not effective".

"And that is why I am very… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/germany-sceptical-about-expanding-euoperation-aspides-strait-hormuz

item.title: Al-Monitor | WHO releases $2 million in emergency funds to Lebanon, Iraq and Syria
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 17:36 UTC ————————————————

March 15 (Reuters) - The World Health Organization said on Sunday it had released $2 million from its Contingency Fund for Emergencies (CFE) to support the health response in Lebanon, Iraq and Syria amidst the ongoing crisis in the Middle East.

The conflict has triggered a large-scale population movement, the WHO said last week, estimating that… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/who-releases-2-million-emergency-funds-lebanon-iraq-and-syria

item.title: Al-Monitor | Netanyahu posts video in response to Iran rumours that he is dead
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 17:36 UTC ————————————————

JERUSALEM, March 15 (Reuters) - Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu posted a video of himself getting a cup of coffee and chatting with his aide on Sunday, after rumours that he was dead or injured were aired by Iranian state media and spread online in Iran.

In the video, taken at a cafe in Jerusalem's outskirts and posted on Netanyahu's… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/netanyahu-posts-video-response-iran-rumours-he-dead

item.title: Al-Monitor | Exclusive-Iran wants 'serious review' of Arab Gulf ties, denies role in Saudi oil attacks
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 17:36 UTC ————————————————

By Timour Azhari

RIYADH, March 15 (Reuters) - Iran's relations with Arab Gulf states will require a "serious review" in light of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran, limitingthe power of external actors so the region can become prosperous, Tehran's ambassador to Saudi Arabia told Reuters on Sunday.

Asked if he was concerned that relations would be… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/exclusive-iran-wants-serious-review-arab-gulf-ties-denies-role-saudi-oil-attacks

item.title: Times of Israel | Israeli Air Force Commander on Iran Missions - Sponsored Content
item.description:
Times of Israel • Mar 15, 2026 17:21 UTC ————————————————

We interviewed “Major G”, a 25-year veteran of the Israeli Air Force who has been working around the clock since Operation Roaring Lion was launched on February 28.

The post Israeli Air Force Commander on Iran Missions appeared first on

item.title: Al-Monitor | In heavy rain, Lebanese fleeing war huddle under makeshift shelters
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 17:01 UTC ————————————————

By Ahmed Kerdi

BEIRUT/SIDON, March 15 (Reuters) - Hussain Murtada and his family are camping in the back of a small truck, a flimsy tarpaulin shielding them from a storm on Sunday, with no room left at shelters for displaced people in the southern Lebanese city of Sidon.

"We are putting tarp over it because we're soaked," said Murtada, using… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/heavy-rain-lebanese-fleeing-war-huddle-under-makeshift-shelters

item.title: Al-Monitor | Hundreds join banned UK pro-Palestinian march
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Mar 15, 2026 17:00 UTC ————————————————

Hundreds of people turned out in London Sunday for a pro-Palestinian march banned by the government after police said it was organised by a group "supportive of the Iranian regime".

Police said in a statement they had arrested 12 people and were investigating anti-Israeli chants allegedly made at the rally.

Interior Minister Shabana Mahmood… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/hundreds-join-banned-uk-pro-palestinian-march

item.title: Al Bawaba | Iran signals no diplomatic talks with US during ongoing conflict
item.description: Al Bawaba • Mar 15, 2026 15:38 UTC ———————————————— ALBAWABA - The Secretary of the Supreme National Security Council in Iran, Ali Larijani, has issued a warning about what he called a conspiracy including the remains of the Jeffrey Epstein network that aims to stage a significant strike and place the blame on Iran... ———————————————— Read more: https://www.albawaba.com/news/iran-signals-no-diplomatic-talks-us-1623827
